message:
Pin Rust toolchain and configure optimized build environment

Establish baseline build infrastructure following RUST_BEST_PRACTICES_GUIDE.md:

## rust-toolchain.toml
- Pin to Rust 1.84.0 (latest stable, matching workspace rust-version)
- Include rustfmt, clippy, and rust-analyzer components
- Target Linux (dev), Windows MSVC (production), and WASM (future UI experiments)
- Ensures reproducible builds across all agent environments

## .cargo/config.toml
- Linux: Use clang + mold linker for 2-5x faster incremental builds
- Linux: Enable target-cpu=native for SIMD optimizations in Tantivy and rkyv
- Windows: Static CRT linking for simplified deployment (no MSVC runtime dependency)
- Add cargo aliases: `fmt-check` and `lint` for pre-commit workflows
- Configure git-fetch-with-cli for authenticated cargo dependencies

## Cargo.toml (workspace root)
- Bump edition to 2024 (pattern matching, async improvements)
- Bump rust-version to 1.84 (aligned with toolchain)
- No code changes yet; preserves existing structure

Rationale:
- Edition 2024 provides cleaner async/await syntax and improved diagnostics
- Pinning toolchain prevents "works on my machine" issues across multi-agent development
- mold linker critical for fast iteration in metadata indexing development (§12.2)
- Static CRT eliminates deployment complexity for Windows service (§11.1)

This commit fulfills bead ultrasearch-c00.1.1 (toolchain/config scaffolding).

Related: PLAN §12.1 (service skeleton), AGENTS.md (cargo-only builds)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+[build]
+# Prefer fast, modern linkers and explicit CPU tuning where available.
+rustflags = []
+
+[target.x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu]
+linker = "clang"
+rustflags = [
+    "-C", "link-arg=-fuse-ld=mold",
+    "-C", "target-cpu=native",
+]
+
+[target.x86_64-pc-windows-msvc]
+# Static CRT for simpler deployment; adjust if dynamic linking is required.
+rustflags = ["-C", "target-feature=+crt-static"]
+
+[net]
+git-fetch-with-cli = true
+
+[alias]
+fmt-check = "fmt --all --check"
+lint = "clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings"

@@ -17,8 +17,8 @@ members = [
 resolver = "2"
 
 [workspace.package]
-edition = "2021"
-rust-version = "1.80"
+edition = "2024"
+rust-version = "1.84"
 license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
 authors = ["Jeffrey Emanuel <jeffrey.emanuel@gmail.com>"]
 repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/ultrasearch"
